measurement_note: Size is n, with n Users rows and n Transactions rows. The legal 32/128/512 tiers span 16x; each user both pays and receives one unit, so all aggregates matter while every final balance remains zero. The remotely Accepted signed-flow aggregation is O(N log N) in the portable bound, and an independent pair of grouped aggregates also passes. Correct per-user correlated incoming/outgoing sums complete every tier and are rejected only by O(n^2) scaling.
